categories.description: High-star repositories actively maintained this week

repos.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

repos.name: awesome
repos.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics

repos.description: A collective list of free APIs

repos.name: free-programming-books
repos.description: :books: Freely available programming books

repos.name: openclaw
repos.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

repos.name: developer-roadmap
repos.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.

repos.name: awesome-python
repos.description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources

repos.name: awesome-selfhosted
repos.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

repos.name: react
repos.description: The library for web and native user interfaces.

repos.name: superpowers
repos.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: linux
repos.description: Linux kernel source tree

repos.name: ECC
repos.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: computer-science
repos.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

repos.name: hermes-agent
repos.description: The agent that grows with you

repos.name: javascript-algorithms
repos.description: 📝 Algorithms and data structures implemented in JavaScript with explanations and links to further readings

repos.name: tensorflow
repos.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

repos.name: claw-code
repos.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.

repos.name: n8n
repos.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

repos.name: ohmyzsh
repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

categories.label: New This Month
categories.description: Repositories created in the last 30 days gaining traction

repos.name: odysseus
repos.description: Self-hosted AI workspace.

repos.name: ponytail
repos.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

repos.name: Unlimited-OCR
repos.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.

repos.name: MiMo-Code
repos.description: MiMo Code: Where Models and Agents Co-Evolve

repos.name: book
repos.description: The canonical reference for Astrid OS: kernel, capsules, host ABI, the bus, and the security model.

repos.name: handbook
repos.description: How to work on Astrid: the polyrepo, the kernel-is-dumb law, the RFC trigger, contribution tiers, and the release process.

repos.name: improve
repos.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.

repos.name: omnigent
repos.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.

repos.name: Mineradio
repos.description: 一款以电影镜头、粒子视觉和歌词舞台为核心的沉浸式音乐播放器。

repos.name: lottie
repos.description: Generate production-ready Lottie animations with Claude Code or Codex

repos.name: loop-engineering
repos.description: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.

repos.name: skylight
repos.description: Project the aircraft passing overhead onto your ceiling in real time, from an RTL-SDR — with a live sky layer (sun, moon, stars, ISS) and where each plane is headed.

repos.name: eve
repos.description: The Framework for Building Agents

repos.name: skills
repos.description: Skills for coding agents

repos.name: devspace
repos.description: Turn ChatGPT into Codex!

repos.name: goose
repos.description: Goose Swift proof-of-concept README

repos.name: kage
repos.description: Shadow any website for offline viewing, with the JavaScript stripped out

repos.name: DeepSpec
repos.description: DeepSpec: a full-stack codebase for training and evaluating speculative decoding algorithms

repos.name: nub
repos.description: The fast all-in-one Node.js toolkit
